title: 2095 The Canterbury Grotesques - Wooden Street Gargoyles
description:
These are a surviving remnant of Canterbury's past - The carved wooden figures are above a blocked off door of a cafe that used to be a 'house of ill repute'
you can find the STL files here https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6287833
Don't forget to check out my companion channels TnT Onibus here https://www.youtube.com/@TnTOmnibus  and TnT Talk Time found here https://www.youtube.com/@TnTtalktime
